summary: Google Vertex AI model-version documentation lists Gemini 2.0 Flash stable model IDs with a June 1, 2026 retirement date and points developers toward newer Gemini stable models.
title: Google Vertex AI Retires Gemini 2.0 Flash Stable Models

summary: Anthropic launched Claude 3.7 Sonnet across its developer platform and partner cloud surfaces, adding a model option with standard and extended-thinking modes.
title: Anthropic Launches Claude 3.7 Sonnet

summary: AWS announced a preview of Amazon Bedrock prompt caching, allowing supported models and regions to reuse repeated prompt content and change token-processing cost behavior.
title: Amazon Bedrock Adds Prompt Caching Preview

summary: Microsoft Learn lists legacy Azure OpenAI GPT-3, Codex, and first-generation embedding model IDs as retired, with replacement guidance for newer instruct and embedding models.
title: Azure OpenAI Retires Legacy GPT-3 Model IDs

summary: OpenAI retired older GPT-3 completions-era model IDs and first-generation embedding models, requiring applications that still referenced those IDs to migrate to replacement models.
title: OpenAI Retires Older GPT-3 Completions Models
